description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that uses the docker image with a docker:dind service and runs the exact commands ./dockerfiles/build.sh, docker login -u btimperman -p $HUB_PASSWORD, and ./dockerfiles/push.sh. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the btimperman/env:ucp-compose image, sets COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME=ab and COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.prod.yml, then runs docker-compose down, docker-compose pull, docker-compose up -d, changes COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME to registrator and COMPOSE_FILE to registrators.yml, and runs docker-compose down and docker-compose up -d. The deploy job also defines COMPOSE_FILE and COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME variables; no caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
